Pricing built for businesses of all sizes

Standard pricing

Access a complete payments platform with simple, pay-as-you-go pricing.

Standard pricing

1,5% + 0,25 € for standard European Economic Area cards

2,5% + 0,25 € for UK cards

3,25% + 0,25 € for international cards

+ 2% if currency conversion is required

Payments

Domestic cards

1,5% + 0,25 € for standard European Economic Area cards

1,9% + 0,25 € for premium European Economic Area cards

International cards

2,5% + 0,25 € for UK cards

3,25% + 0,25 € for international cards

+ 2% if currency conversion is required

Bank-based and other payment methods

0,35 € SEPA Direct Debit

Terminal

Cards and wallets

1,4% + 0,10 € per successful charge for EEA cards

2,9% + 0,10 € per successful charge for non-EEA cards

+ 0,10 € per authorisation for Tap to Pay

Disputes

Dispute received fee

20,00 € for each dispute you receive.

Dispute countered fee

20,00 € for each dispute you respond to manually.

FAQs

Are there additional fees for refunds?

No. There are no additional fees for refunds.
